lines: I used to set an alarm just to make sure I texted you good morning before you woke up. Every single day. Not because you asked. Because I actually wanted to.
You would say something jokingly and I would just do it. That probably made me look like a fool but I did not care because I really liked you back then.
I think I always knew somewhere in the back of my mind that you had someone else you actually wanted. I just kept showing up anyway hoping that would change.
Then somewhere along the way I became someone who just did what you said. I do not even know when that happened. I just know it was not who I was when I started liking you.
You being older never bothered me. I thought that meant something. Turns out it just meant I was young enough to think effort alone was enough to make someone choose you.
The worst part is not that you liked someone else. The worst part is that I knew and I stayed anyway because being your backup felt better than not being in your life at all.

Now when you say you miss me I reply and say I miss you more. But I am just being polite. The feeling behind it is gone because I finally got tired of being the option you come back to when things do not work out with them.
I am not angry. I am just honest. What we had was real on my side and I think somewhere deep down you knew that too and still chose to keep me around just in case.
I hope you find what you are actually looking for. I genuinely do. But it is not me anymore and I think it stopped being me the moment I realized I was never really your first choice.
